body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Dependent Arising** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Predictive processing — free energy principle, Bayesian brain, active inference, neural causality.

Paper: Free energy and inference in living systems.
DOI: 10.1098/rsfs.2022.0041
Abstract: Organisms are non-equilibrium, stationary systems self-organized via spontaneous symmetry breaking and undergoing metabolic cycles with broken detailed balance in the environment. The thermodynamic free-energy (FE) principle describes an organism's homeostasis as the regulation of biochemical work constrained by the physical FE cost.
